reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Abby, we're stoked to hear you love the patio vibes!

review_questions.Parking options: Paid parking lot, Free street parking, Paid street parking

reviews_data.review_text: My favorite place for an outdoor drink in Charlotte! No frills, just a great outdoor patio and vibe

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Raechel,

While we always welcome feedback from our guests, our team worked diligently with you and your fiancé to find the best solution for your engagement party.

The greed upon terms, that we both have in writing, were not honored by you and your guests. You intentionally stayed past your alloted time, and you refused to remove your decorations so we could open up the patio to our other guests after we asked you to do so multiple times.

After your event, you even had the nerve to try to get a refund on the platform that you booked your event through, without ever contacting our team directly to discuss your concerns. 

If you didn't want to pay to book a private event in a public space, you shouldn't have attempted to book ours or any other space.

We are honoured to be custodians of such a beautiful and historic space in the heart of Noda, and our team will always work with our guests to assist them in booking and planning the perfect event.

review_questions.Group size: 3-4 people, Suitable for all group sizes
review_questions.Parking options: Paid parking lot, Paid street parking

reviews_data.review_text:
Disappointing experience booking this venue for a private event. There were last-minute pricing changes, communication issues, and a written agreement for private space that was not honored. The space was not private during our reserved time, and event setup was not completed as agreed.

While the venue itself has potential, the lack of organization, inconsistent communication, and failure to follow through on agreed-upon terms made this a frustrating experience. I would use caution when booking for private events.

Update: In response to the owner’s reply — It’s a clear representation of how they handle constructive feedback and their unwillingness to acknowledge that their “private event space” listing was inaccurate. While the space is beautiful and the owner was kind initially, my review is simply to explain my experience and to provide caution to other people who are looking for a private event space.
driven here twice from out of town, but opening hours aren’t accurate. Very frustrating.

I was immediately wow’ed by the vibes and environment here. The selection of beers, wines, sangria etc is fantastic. Eclectic mix of unique products and amazing patio environment is everything NODA needs. Unfortunately it went downhill because there is 0 urgency at the bar and it took 15 mins in line to get a drink behind a few people. You can cut the line by going to the side of the bar. There is no order. I get it, busy Friday.. but it just seemed like there was no preparation at all. They were out of sangria at 5pm. Ingredients were “around.”

I let the bartender know that the single bathroom was out of toilet paper and paper towels and was met with unbelievable attitude as he pointed to a handwritten “out of order” sign that had just appeared within the visit because it had been available at some point. I entered through the side so I didn’t see it.

Hopefully service improves because the place is super cool.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Nice to have fresh grapefruit for drinks. Eclectic space with plenty of outside options. Seemed like no food available.
Wow is all I have to say just went in there to use the bathroom and get some water 💧. But I was very impressed 👌 with the place, very classy and unique. Definitely will be back soon
We all face challenges paying bills, but buying products, selling them, and not paying is simply not professional.👎🏻

I want to make the public aware of an ongoing issue we are facing.

Noda Company  placed orders with us, received the product in full, sold the product, and has not paid us since November. Despite repeated attempts to contact them, they have been avoiding communication and resolving the outstanding balance.

We are a small, locally owned business, and situations like this have a real impact on companies like ours

I am sharing this not out of anger, but to encourage accountability and transparency, and to remind others to be mindful of where they spend their money and who they choose to support.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the review Jo! We're happy to hear you had a great experience. Cheers!
reviews_data.review_text: This place has a magical patio, that you wouldn't think from looking at the house turned bar. Very eclectic, nice selection of beer and wine. Outside food is allowed. Dog friendly. We came back and were pleasantly surprised to find this place has new local ownership, Jessie and Brandon. They are in the process of changing the vibe, making it more comfortable and cozy. Love the jazzy music selection, dim lights and candles. Huge back patio, they got rid of the tropical plants and put in sustainable native plants. (Jessie is an awesome gardener). Their shop dog Otis is adorable. Great place to have events and trivia, noise level is pleasant and can have a conversation with people. Good luck guys, we wish you the best 💚

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Mike! We really appreciate the 5-star review and the fact you enjoyed your visit! Cheers!
reviews_data.review_text: Updating my review for new owners Jesse and Brandon.  The vibe inside is so cool.  I did not update my outside pics because it is dark out.  Jesse said they have all native plants.  They are going to get their liquor license soon and will have food options in 2026.  Parking in NoDa is a challenge but they are next to a paid parking lot.  Music is not loud.  I take the train from uptown to 36th station to visit. Tuesday is their trivia night.
Chill. Like very chill. They love their peeps and their peeps love them back. You’ll find yourself at home here no matter the intent. Alcohol to non it’s the place to meet your person.
Great new management. Great vibes.

review_questions.Parking options: Paid parking lot, Free street parking

reviews_data.review_text: Great spot for a drink. Can be inside or there is a lot of outside seating. Dog friendly.
Fabulous place to visit!!! Great wine!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for the 5 star review Anna! We look forward to seeing you again soon 😊.

review_questions.Noise level: Loud, but you can still talk

reviews_data.review_text: Employees and owners are super kind, great DJ’s, great drink selection

Visiting from out of town and always looking for interesting spots. Very cool place did not disappoint.  Fun outdoor seating w plenty of options, funky beer cafe vibe inside, a great local beer selection, and I’m always a sucker for a popcorn machine!  Definitely worth checking out!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews_data.review_text: OK… If you’re in NODA Area and are looking for a place to meet up with friends or just hang out for a bit this place has some of the most incredible vibes. I’ve been to in quite a while. This is the go to place in Noda believe me you’re not gonna be disappointed. There is plenty of seating area inside outside or swings. There’s all kind of private area that you can go to the place is comfortable and it’s under a new management as of two months ago… We’re talking about July 20 25? Anyway, the picture of these two guys behind the bar, one of them is the owner or possibly both of them and they give out samples of beer and the service is great and the atmosphere is just freaking off the charts. I met my son here we played some chess and had a great talk this place should’ve been crowded the next time you’re in Nordone just do yourself a favor and check it out. Have a beer and a good discussion

Love this place! Great for hanging out with friends and grabbing a drink. They have beers on tap, canned beers and na drinks, and yummy sangrias. The put door seating is unmatched and perfect for people watching!

This is such a neighborhood staple and they are such community builders. It’s easy to strike up a conversation, share a table and make a new friend At this dog friendly outdoor patio bar. The inside space where you order is not so big, but there are plenty of places to sit in front, in back or on the side of the house. Everyone’s favorite seating are the swing chairs!!
Love how easy they made it. This place definitely lives up to the reviews.

I met friends here because NoDa Company Store had a DJ event on their back patio. The music was exceptional, with Eclipsed Shadows, the DJ duo of Dark Adaptation and Andrew ElectronC, killing it with their drumnbass set.

A catering company set up on the patio and they had what looked to be delicious food but the skies opened just as they were getting ready to serve, so we weren't able to try the food. I also didn't go inside for alcohol, since I don't drink, so I can't attest to their selection, the staff, prices, atmosphere, or food selection, but from what I experienced on the patio, it very much makes me want to check those things out the next time I'm in NoDa! Can't wait to go back!
Cute place for a cold drink! Cute back area with swings, shade and a drink you’re all set! LGBTQIA2S+ friendly

We came here for an informal wedding reception for some friends, and it was perfect! The vibe is super relaxed with lots of seating, fun porch swings, and a great drink selection. It felt like hanging out in someone’s backyard—in the best way. Such a cool spot to gather and celebrate!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the 5-star review! We appreciate your patronage!
reviews_data.review_text: Best place to get some beer and hang out with friends

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the 5-star review! We really appreciate the feedback and that you had a great experience with us! Cheers and Happy Holidays!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Dumpling Lady, Frozen, Pork Belly Noodles, Dumplings, Pork Belly Dumpling, Canada Dry, Empanada, Warm Baguette, Slurpy, Triple C, Crepe, Rosé, Prosciutto, Four Cheese, Noda Hop Drop'n Roll, Make It a Double

reviews_data.review_text: What a cute little busy place. Small menu, very diverse & cute tiki style seating.  I ordered a Cbd drink Goodwell. It was very good.  Service was nice too. Hope to come back and hang around this area more. Blessed. Thank you kindly.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the awesome review, Maikoi! Happy Holidays!
reviews_data.review_text: Love it! Best experiences there

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the 5-star review, Kimberly! Cheers to you and Happy Holidays!
reviews_data.review_text: First time to NoDa and love the vibe of the neighborhood. And the NoDa company store is a perfect spot in this great part of town. Went for a happy hour drink, sat on the patio- loved all the fun sitting areas, ambiance with many plants and the drinks were tasty too! Wish there was a NoDa Co store in my hometown!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We're glad to hear you had a great experience with us! There's plenty more SUNBOY available! Cheers and Happy Holidays!
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing backyard, pristine vibes. The team here is warm and welcoming. Perfect place to really spread out in the sunshine. Tons of picnic tables and shade. Love this spot for a SUNBOY Spiked Coconut water and an afternoon hang.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the awesome review, John! We're happy to hear everything went well and you all had an awesome day with us!
reviews_data.review_text: Can’t have enough good things to say. The owner(THANK YOU JOHN!) accommodate our party after we had a wedding canceled in Asheville. They were able to host our whole group and was texting and calling to coordinate past 9pm on a Saturday. Go to Noda Company Store, they will treat you right.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We appreciate the review, Mark! For future reference feel free to bring take out when hunger ails you. Cheers!  :)
reviews_data.review_text: Didn't have food, but the service was excellent and the atmosphere was cozy enough to spark great conversations. Just stopped in for a late night drink.

Rated a 5 on food because the VooDoo chips and plantain chips are awesome (they don’t serve hot food here). This is my favorite spot in NoDa by far. About a year ago, it looked downtrodden - the plants were dead, the atmosphere was dull, it wasn’t being taken care of - NOW! the plants are beautiful, the market lighting at night is so charming, the music is the best … and the pina colada is awesome. I love the rotating beers on tap and the Sunday Sangria is a fun surprise every week. The indoor seating is a nice place to escape the heat too. 10/10 best spot in NoDa.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Ryan. Part of the transfer of ownership included the original owners taking the NoDaColada recipe with them. We mutually agreed on this as it was their personal recipe. 

Stay tuned for new drinks as well as mocktails!

We apologize that you didn’t enjoy your time at NoDa Company Store. We ask for your patience as we develop new offerings.
reviews_data.review_text: Update: the topicolada is back and it slaps. This place rocks again.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you for the awesome review Rachel! We’ll be sure to let Olivia know!

Cheers!
reviews_data.review_text: Even after the “change” Olivia made it the best/same experience we’ve always had. Thank you!

I don't know yow I didn't know this was right around the corner. Staff were knowledgeable and provided quick service. The atmosphere is chill and relaxing. Will definitely be back. New hangout activated.
Love coming here for drinks with friends and family.
Beer and wine only. Great low key patio
Such a great spot! Super cute and good drink options.
The people are superb and the vibe is so welcoming. I cannot wait to go back!

Cute little place that has some beer on tap, custom cocktails, some frozen. Beer, wine, seltzers stocked. Some snacks.  The outdoor area is so nicely themed with some swings and tables to enjoy the weather
Beautiful outside sitting area. It’s quaint setting with swings, wooden benches, huts, beautiful setting. Wonderful area in Noda to spend time in evening. They have great selection of drinks.
Great place to pop in for a drink. We really enjoy the swings.

I have been visiting The Store since it first opened. Coming here is like coming home.  There is always a warm and friendly smile waiting for you.  Oh, their NoDa Colada during the summer, and their spiced mull wine in the fall are perfection!
Just to be clear the swings were not hung by professionals. If you sit on one keep your wits about you or you'll end up on your bum.
Best spot ever. Just saying 😏 Great outdoor seating, friendly staff and delicious beer. Must visit!
A wonderful outdoor spot to hang out. The absolute perfect spot for a Sunday Funday! They don't have the largest selection of drink choices but always end up finding something I like.
Just had drinks but love the back patio and thr beet selection.
Our most favorite Hang out spot in Charlotte PERIODT!!! 👑❤️🙏🏾👊🏾💪🏾🦄
They don’t have a lot of options other than craft beer but the vibes are nice and the service was friendly.

Looks like a fun place in the evening.
We came just as they opened, at noon, so the place was empty.
Still, we got a friendly service, and the drinks were amazing!! Definitely try their version of the bloody Mary!
The staff was friendly and nice, and we'll definitely come back some evening to enjoy the full potential this place has.
Great place to have a drink and chat.....

The Beer Garden is undoubtedly done up very nicely and is a great place to hang out for some beers. It’s tucked away enough so that it still feels a little bit like a secret. They have some cool T-shirts etc. for sale inside and a decent selection of drinks. It can be very long wait times for the bar since it is small and they only have one bathroom so it can be a bit of a wait for that also. They’ve started to put porta potty’s in the beer garden which is a mistake on hot days.

Came here for drinks and the cute patio! Unfortunately all of the drinks are wine/beer based and no seltzers or seltzer type drinks. However; the frozen colada was yummy and didn’t taste like wine like the other beverages. We enjoyed the patio!

Loved the Noda Company Store. I can’t believe I’ve lived here almost a year and never found it before. Such friendly service and a great draft list and tons of snacks and other beverages to choose from. I could’ve even brought my dog. I had no idea. So excited to go back
This place is one of a kind! Amazing experience, beautiful patio, NoDa Colada are to die for… If you haven’t been, you’re missing one of the best places in Charlotte. Go!
Best Patio, Local Store, and Service!!! Also Free Lunch Sundays are amazing! Every employee is phenomenal! 👑🙏🏾💪🏾👊🏾❤️🖤💚
Such a relaxing aesthetic. Awesome service and fun drinks! Will be back
My favorite spot in the city!  Great people, craft beer and wine cocktails (no spirits), art, games, swings and more.
Cool place. Good environment
Noda's back porch. Such a cool, casual atmosphere. Easy place to hang out any time of day, any day of the week.
Lovely little backyard oasis. Try the noda colada!
Cute 🤷‍♂️ boring staff though..
Cool Vibe
Worth checking out. Good time
Always a great experience
Neat place. Nice outdoor area, which is the focal of this venue. Drinks were just ok. Except I enjoyed the Pina colada drink.
Nice outdoor space

My all time favorite place in Noda. The atmosphere. The renovated bungalow. Everything about it is so relaxing, welcoming and just a great place for friends, family, date night, day drinking. You name it.
Great beer selection and cool patio with a bit of a tiki theme.
Best place to hang out in the neighborhood. Staff is always nice and the atmosphere can't be beat
Great  hangout!
Super cute patio and wine slushies!
Delicious, wonderful environment and great price
Always been a favorite spot.. since they turned that empty house into the fun spot.  Great drink selection, snacks to buy, and always welcome my 🐶 love the owners too! So kind!
Great casual place to grab a drink and as it outside in beautiful tropical looking back patio. Snacks and no alcoholic drinks available. And free food grilled outside on select Sunday Fundays.
Good beer selection on tap and in cans.
Really cute outdoor setup that makes you feel you're not in Charlotte anymore. I had the non-frozen Noda Colada & the Sangria and they were both ON POINT!

The employees are SO sweet. Whitney (I think that was her name!) went out of their way to make our experience a good one and this is one of our favorite places to go for drinks. The patio area is very cute and fun and a perfect photo opportunity.
Really like the atmosphere. Groovy spot
Great service, great atmosphere, one of my favorite spots.
We went here for a long weekend in Charlotte. We loved ordering drinks and sitting on the swings. Definitely would go again!
Awesome Atmosphere. Enjoyable.  Relaxed, Wonderful Hosts. Friendly Fun Sunday Funday Afternoon
bonita experiencia, muy buena calidad de la cerveza
Great beer selection, well priced, and awesome outdoor area. An awesome hidden gem in NoDa that everyone needs to try. The swings are a huge plus. Will come back again!
buen ambiente y de las mejores cervezas que he probado jamas...

This is a great place to enjoy wine by the bottle or a pitcher of beer, or just a pint and sit on the patio. I took a star off because all the seating is outside. It's so hot now and with all other business open for inside service again it would be great to have some inside seating added back and maybe some stronger fans outside.
Music atmosphere drinks all 5 star
Vibes are perfect here. Come outside and sit under the tree and enjoy a beer. Can meet great people here.
The

Great place to experience NODA. It truly has the vibe of the area, very relaxed and peaceful with beautiful diversity. They have a great drink selection including a draft list, sangrias, coladas and mimosas. The outdoor area is wonderful, full of beautiful greenery and vibrant flowers complete with swings to enjoy the view. It is a great, local spot and we find ourselves here often. I highly recommend if you want to relax in a swing, sip a great drink and meet locals.
Fantastic outdoor atmosphere.  Love the frosty drinks to give you a tropical vibe
Awesome atmosphere comfortable seating options and the staff was very helpful
Such a gem, never disappointed! I love this place 😍

Fun oasis in NoDa. Unique twist on a sangria in a warm and welcoming atmosphere. Variety of seating available. Parking can be tough in this neighborhood but a surface lot is next door. Great place for a date.
Come for good drinks, unique outdoor space, and to support local business owners. I always bring my friends from out of town here because it’s my favorite brewery in Charlotte!

Such a quaint find! Absolutely loved the outdoor seating area to have a drink and relax.  The drink selection is a bit limited, but the sangrias were very good.  As a bonus, it is dog friendly but not off leash so you can bring your furry friend without worry and sit outside with a large group.  I think you could probably fit a good dozen people in some of the seating areas or share one of those spaces with another small group. This place is adorable so we'll definitely be going back!

What can I say about the company store other than its probably one of the top 5 patios in Charlotte. They are really dog friendly but you need to keep.your pup.on a leash. They've always got a great draft selection, tons of cans in the coolers and snack food. They have pitchers of drinks as well. They have many seating options to choose from such as huge banquettes, fire pits, swings. Some are even covered. Do yourself a favor and pay to park in the lot in the back.
Absolutely love this place! Amazing outdoor patio. Always a fun place to chill. Love the sangria!!
This place is amazing!
Super cozy outdoor bar. Met my coworkers there and we had a great time! Dog friendly too so they can also enjoy the patio. Will definitely come back with my pups!
Great bottle shop w lots of outdoor seating
Very nice bartenders and great beer! Love the atmosphere.
I love this place is perfect for dates .
Still one of my all time favorite places. Amazing staff and service. Their patio just can't be beat!

One of my favorite places in Noda. Such an eclectic and fun place to enjoy local brews and people watching. There are ample places to sit, at both large group benches around fire pit tables and more fun intimate spots like the rope swing tiki huts. It's best in warmer weather since it's all outdoor seating currently.
These guys dealt with the challenges of COVID brilliantly. A true asset to the neighborhood, and a great place to have a beer.
Awesome outdoor seating with heat and great service and of course beer...Duh

Great, simple spot in the NoDa area. Seating is outside, so you need to take the weather into consideration. During Covid times, outside seating is spaced out enough where you can enjoy a drink without a mask on. You order your drinks inside and you can also take home a six pack of your favorite beer or a bottle of wine. Dogs are welcome outside.

Amazing tropical patio with unique interesting elements. FrieStore is exhibiting excellent caution for COVID as well.

Good beer and wine selection with decent prices. Definitely a new favorite to work during work hours or chill after hours.
A true Noda neighborhood gem!
One of the best little stores in town, love the owners, love the neighborhood, love the selection. What's not to like?
Beaitiful setting, fantastic atmosphere, good drinks!

One of the best patios in Charlotte, loved the experience. Grabbed a few bottles of wine with a cheese plate and some other appetizers and just enjoyed the moment with good friends. Highly recommend stopping by and having a great time at this spot!!
Cute patio and doggie park!
The vibe, music, atmosphere can't be beat 💯
Love this place, but there is this one guy (short, with dark hair) that is just not friendly at all. I would give it a 5 star cause this is a super cool spot and the owners are great!
Great beer and environment!

Th3 wnuv
Znizzle in your nizzle
Cool patio with beach vibes. Beers by the can or on draft collection with a dog friendly patio!
Love this place! So cool and welcoming! Must visit!!
Adequate bar with good Bloody Marys.
Great neighborhood hangout
Great place for a chill evening. Wide variety of beer and wine options. Friendly staff and patrons. Lovely outdoor area.
Hip & comfortable place.  Outdoor seating available with a little firepit.

Great spot. The beer is good the sangria was awesome! The outdoor area is such a great spot to hang out. The place has an awesome
vibe
I dont get here as often as Id like. I consider Scott and Joey  Family. One of my favorite spots in Noda

Appears to be a pretty nice and comfortable gathering spot. I visited the lobster roll truck on site and it was good. The beer selection on the inside was pretty typical for the area. Worth a visit if the NODA crowd is yours.

I'm really reluctant to write this review, just because I don't want MORE people to come to my favorite spot of all times! The Company Store is absolutely wonderful, as is every single person who works there. <3 The selection of drinks is great and prices are fair. I especially love their winter specials (mulled wine and mulled cider) and the amazing food trucks that they attract! If you're vegan, they have a food truck for you at least twice a week, if not more often. The ambience is relaxed, and the patio is hands down the best one in the area. If you don't love the Company Store, it's on you, not them!
Great place to chill and sip on a drink.
Very cool place
Good atmosphere. Some fun. Prices ok.

Best place in Charlotte. Great staff, a wide selection on beer, wine and seasonal drinks. Food trucks stop by here (check schedule), winter has a fire pit, summer fun activities. Very nice decor and absolutely chill outside.

Favorite neighborhood spot and massive fan of meatless mondays. Great sangrias and mulled wine. Cozy, eclectic, homey vibe that’s great to bring friends to for a good board game. The owners and staff are friendly faces and keep doing wonderful things for the noda community. Can’t recommend this place enough!!!
A chill spot with fun games, lots of outdoor seating, local beers. Cozy and clean, and dog friendly!
Always a fresh and fun experience! 12/10

I love Noda I love their beer I love the environment there I really really wish they had bar food and not food trucks parked on the outside it doesn't offer much of a variety but then again you don't go to noda for the food If you like noda beer  you'll like the noda company store... I like it...so there's that

What a cute place to hang out! I love the artsy decor. I tried a sweet potato kombuchia . Not bad at all. Also had an apple cider sangria. They had Queen Charlotte bleu pimiento cheese with some local crackers. Delicious. This place does a lot for the community. They're always having free food evenings and stuff. Bought a cute tee shirt here. Loved it
Nice place to swing by and grab a drink.  Patio is nice, and they let you bring food.
Meatless Monday’s is great for vegan beginners
This place is Huge.  It is great place to take a girl on the first date.  There are tons of little nooks that you can sit where you can get a casual setting to have one on one attention.
Casual place to hang out and drink some beer or wine. Lots of outdoor seating to choose from (good shaded options too!). No food (except some snacks) but there is often a food truck.

Love the atmosphere.
Feels like your at Scott and Joeys home
This is my favorite place. GREAT owners. GREAT staff. Good Morning Vietnam. Meatless Mondays. Everything. ❤🍻
The place totally rocks!  Love the beers, love the vibe, and love MEATLESS MONDAYS!
Great vibes and free food on monday
So relaxing. Scott & Joey are amazing people!!
Always a good time at NoDa Company Store. My wife, pup, and I love the variety of outdoor seating and lovely people
One of my favorite places in Noda. Atmosphere is great. Service is very friendly. Pet friendly with rotating taps, food trucks, and kombucha.
They have adult slushies and swings. Literally, that's all you need to know. Just go.
Quaint bottle shop in Noda off the main strip
Great beer selection. The Dumpling Lady food truck out back is amazing!
One of the best places in Charlotte! Love having a drink outside on a nice day. Try the sangria or NoDa colada.
Great beer, great ambiance, great service!
Always a laid back great time. Staff is the beat!
Nice place to relax and have something to drink. Great vibe.
love the outdoor space!
Friendly atmosphere, great neighborhood bar.
Had a great first experience! Melissa was so very helpful and super sweet to my child! Will definitely be regulars now!
Decent outdoor section
Cool hang out. Nice to staff and good beer selection!!

We had a happy hour here tonight and I loved it.

The environment was very laid back. There's a decent size indoor area, a front porch, and a huge back patio. We got a table in the shade on the patio.

They have beers on tap and bottles. There's wine, cider, sangria, kombucha, and some snacks. They also have a food truck there.

Overall, this is a great place to relax and have a drink. I would definitely recommend it!
Nice staff and very relaxed environment. Also the free food on Sundays is always good.
Probably the place we go to the most. Really laid back atmosphere. Dog friendly.
Nice little spot!
Great place to spend a Sunday afternoon
They have a few card/board games. Decent number of beer options. Friendly service. Nice outdoor seating.
Interesting mix of people in a comfortable and affordable environment

N.C.S. is amazing place to chillax with family, friends, boyfriend(girl), dog or yourself.
The atmosphere here is incredible good. Dont forget to get your souvenir.
P&L ✌🏼
An awesome place to hang out. And prosecco on tap?!? Yes, please!!!
I love this place! Such a great place to have a tasty drink (alcoholic or non) and vibe out. The staff is phenomenal and it feels like home!
Eclectic!
Super cool place to check out, we loved it
Was atmospheric but smelled like cigarettes

This is a really gorgeous spot to sit and relax with a book and a glass (or 4) of beer or wine. The building itself is stupid cute and super homey. There is a huge patio out back, as well as several bench swings that you can post up in and enjoy all the gorgeous plants they have. Try their tasty sangrias!
An excellent spot to hang, day or night.   This place really thrives when you can take advantage of their outdoor space.
I love to swings outside and the whole vibe of this place. Great place to grab a drink with friends!
My favorite spot on a Sunday :)
Fantastic environment. Good people . Good times!
Friendly staff. Great beer selection. Chill environment.
Ok place to just hang out, wasn't much going on when we were there on a Sunday
One of the best places in NoDa. Great drinks. Great staff. Nice atmosphere.
Great place.  Dog friendly. Great beers
Great drink selection along with an inviting atmosphere.
Great atmosphere and great beers to match. Cant wait to come back!
One of a kind place! Laid back store, hangout, farmers market, juice bar and so much more! Full of heart and soul!
Always a great place to grab a drink! Great atmosphere inside and out. Good drink options. Farmers market on saturdays and free lunch on sundays.
One of my favorite brunch or beer spots
Loved the neighborhood vibe to this location. Plenty of seating both indoors and outdoors with great prices on drinks. I’m not sure if it’s just a Monday special but everything behind the bar was $5!
Fun, small, intimate. We played games and had a beer it was great!
I love the location of this place. Great service and great selection of drinks. I'll be back ASAP!
I adore this place. Beautiful aesthetic, wonderful employees and fantastic wine & beer.  Great place for pals to hang!

I've always wanted to go to Sunday funday free brunch. Now the guys have left for Honduras and my heart is broken. The vibe here is very chill and there is always a food truck so you can stop by any night of the week for good eats, drinks, and atmosphere. At the moment I know pasta la vista is there on Tuesdays and dumpling lady is there all day Saturday. I need to get there on an ace of spuds night.
My husband and and I always go here for a low-key pint of beer. We love it most when The Dumpling lady is there too!
Great atmosphere, beautiful place and great people running it. Also a big plus when The Dumpling Lady is there on Saturdays
My favorite neighborhood bar. Let's get some live music!
Great location, easy access, amazing drink selection, cool vib!
Great place with wonderful people 😍

This is my favorite place in Noda and one of my favorite places in Charlotte.  It’s such a chill, inviting, cozy place to hang out and have a couple beverages and/or get some work done.  They have a fantastic outdoor space, too.  The place has so much character, both inside and out!  They have a great food truck line up, too.  They have a very good craft beer selection, as well as wine.  I wish there were more places like Company Store.
Awesome place! They remodeled a bit since I had been there last. It looks great and flows better. They have a great list of all local Charlotte beers on tap. Also live music out back. Check it out!
Nice and quiet place to hang out in the evening
An essential stop if day drinking.
Good beer and a very cozy friendly vibe.
No food and the name makes one think that there are snacks and other things you can buy. Drink selection is not varied.
Great service and very friendly too, the setting and care put into the place shows and is unique to me, would love to show this place to anyone that comes in town and just have a good hangout.
Great selection of beer/wine/cider with a nice outdoor space. Perfect for a midweek chill
Nice patio when the sun goes down.
Great place to hang out

Nice atmosphere. Good beer, we bought ours in a six pack and they gave us a bucket of ice. Games to play.

Reminds me of the Common Market except without food and less grungy.

Good amount of outdoor seating. Dog friendly on a leash.
Un lugar divertido para pasar un rato agradable con amigos o solo. Las bebidas son a un precio justo y se consiguen cervezas de diferentes sabores.

The Co Store is great. There's always something happening, like the NoDa farmers market or food trucks or dance nights. They also have a great sangria always available for $6 or something ridiculously cheap like that. Their patio is pretty unbeatable too because it feels like you're hanging out in someone's back yard, chilling, because they have porch swings. I only wish that it was a little bigger.

Interesting place to hang out on a a Sunday afternoon.  The owners  cook a free lunch for anyone who shows up. The place had an eclectic crowd and the drinks inside has something for everyone. They have cozy seating both inside and out and folks come to hang out.  It is dog, family and bike friendly

Good place to hang out and get to know new people and outside there is a food truck to order fish and chips, there are plenty of seats outside to enjoy the evening, but limited parking unless you park in the paid area.
One of our favorite places to start a night out.
Great quaint gathering place to enjoy a glass of wine or beer! Loved the outdoor space and the swings!
Great mimosas with fresh squeezed orange juice, relaxed neighborhood feel
Good drinks and a great NoDa vibe.

Great little spot to hang out with friends and grab a beer. Scene was vibrant, staff was very pleasant, and shop was clean. Only issue and cause of -1 star was extremely long wait to the only bathroom.
Absolutely love this place. Can't wait to get back and try the food trucks out.
Love this neighborhood hangout.

I love this place! Fun, cozy vibe with multiple outdoor patio areas. They serve a great selection of craft beer, wine, and sangria.  And with their in house selection of board games, this has become a favorite stop for my friend group.
Grab a drink and play some cards against humanity in a laid back and friendly atmosphere.
Great Atmosphere, Friendly Staff, & Welcoming Spirit
Always a good spot. Good drink options and lots of outdoor seating. One of the more laid back places in an otherwise busy part of town.
Love it. Love the sandwich specials.
Really nice and comfy. Chill atmosphere, good selection of drinks and finger foods.
Its so Organic outside. Lol. Free Lunch on Sundays. Not affiliated w NoDa brewing.
Absolutely a new favorite, looks VERY hipster-ish from outside but is super relaxed and cozy inside.
Best bar in the city hands down

There best of NoDa. A chill atmosphere, ample outdoor seating for the warmer months, eclectic artwork, a selection of snacks, bottled beverages, a few taps of beer, sangria and fun people watching make this a great place to hang out. Pop-up food events are always fun (watch Facebook)
Love this place. Everyone is soooo friendly.  The service is excellent
Cozy joint. Cool outdoor space when the weather is right!
Such an awesome place. Staff is super friendly, the beer selection is decent and their free brunches on Sunday mornings is always tasty!
Great atmosphere!

This place is classic NoDa. It's one of my favorite places in the area. This place is kind of tucked behind other places so it's not the easiest to find, but worth the trip!

It's a really laid back atmosphere. The bar tenders are awesome, super friendly and sometimes provide free homemade food(they had cookies and Brunswick stew yesterday!).

The beer menu is awesome. They have a relatively small tap list, but the quality is great. It's usually 100% local beer, and they always have prosecco on tap too! Combine that with some great homemade Sangria and you have a great spot for drinks.

They also serve prepackaged food like chips, hummus, etc. It has a good outside vibe area as well, both in the front and back.
Great Saturday late afternoon for the pup and I. We enjoyed our Pilsner and the dumpling lady's veggie option. Delcious and great locals to meet.

Came here on a local's recommendation. It was pretty quiet for a Sunday afternoon but you can see why people are attracted to the cozy and creatively decorated space. House sangrias in two varieties, local craft beers on tap, and an awesome selection of cans and bottles you can crack open and enjoy in store.
The owners are great, the staff are wonderful and the people always nice.
Cool spot
Good place to relax and have some drinks. Great owners.
Love the atmosphere and the guys that run this place. Such a chill vibe and great place to take anyone for a relaxing afternoon or a night out.
Good drinks, great environment, and always have the best food trucks!
Great place to relax, grab a drink and see your neighbors. Love this place.
Great vibe and atmosphere. Owners are pretty cool and friendly. Good place to hangout with friends, family, or by yourself.
Love the swings!

Great neighborhood spot.  Local beers available and unlike the current trend of having free range children running around everywhere, they went to the trouble of putting in a garden area for adults only where you can chill out and relax.
Reasonably priced drinks and a chill vibe
My favorite place in town. Free, homemade lunch on Sunday’s 11-3. Great porch swings and beer selection. Usually have food trucks but outside food is allowed. Amazing owners.
Cool spot but the markup is absurd. I can get the same beer for a little more than half the price about a mile away.
Awesome place to hang out with friends.

One of our favorite places in Charlotte. We bring out-of-towners who think this city is just banking centers and barbecue. Snag a porch swing chair on the side of the building for a shaded hideaway in the heart of NoDa.

raw_data.description: A multifaceted space for wine, local beer & bar snacks, plus art exhibitions & events.
raw_data.name: NoDa Company Store

popular_times.title: Usually as busy as it gets
Usually as busy as it gets
Usually as busy as it gets
Usually as busy as it gets
Usually as busy as it gets

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much Abby, we're stoked to hear you love the patio vibes!

review_questions.Parking options: Paid parking lot, Free street parking, Paid street parking

reviews_data.review_text: My favorite place for an outdoor drink in Charlotte! No frills, just a great outdoor patio and vibe

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Raechel,

While we always welcome feedback from our guests, our team worked diligently with you and your fiancé to find the best solution for your engagement party.

The greed upon terms, that we both have in writing, were not honored by you and your guests. You intentionally stayed past your alloted time, and you refused to remove your decorations so we could open up the patio to our other guests after we asked you to do so multiple times.

After your event, you even had the nerve to try to get a refund on the platform that you booked your event through, without ever contacting our team directly to discuss your concerns. 

If you didn't want to pay to book a private event in a public space, you shouldn't have attempted to book ours or any other space.

We are honoured to be custodians of such a beautiful and historic space in the heart of Noda, and our team will always work with our guests to assist them in booking and planning the perfect event.

review_questions.Group size: 3-4 people, Suitable for all group sizes
review_questions.Parking options: Paid parking lot, Paid street parking

reviews_data.review_text:
Disappointing experience booking this venue for a private event. There were last-minute pricing changes, communication issues, and a written agreement for private space that was not honored. The space was not private during our reserved time, and event setup was not completed as agreed.

While the venue itself has potential, the lack of organization, inconsistent communication, and failure to follow through on agreed-upon terms made this a frustrating experience. I would use caution when booking for private events.

Update: In response to the owner’s reply — It’s a clear representation of how they handle constructive feedback and their unwillingness to acknowledge that their “private event space” listing was inaccurate. While the space is beautiful and the owner was kind initially, my review is simply to explain my experience and to provide caution to other people who are looking for a private event space.
driven here twice from out of town, but opening hours aren’t accurate. Very frustrating.

I was immediately wow’ed by the vibes and environment here. The selection of beers, wines, sangria etc is fantastic. Eclectic mix of unique products and amazing patio environment is everything NODA needs. Unfortunately it went downhill because there is 0 urgency at the bar and it took 15 mins in line to get a drink behind a few people. You can cut the line by going to the side of the bar. There is no order. I get it, busy Friday.. but it just seemed like there was no preparation at all. They were out of sangria at 5pm. Ingredients were “around.”

I let the bartender know that the single bathroom was out of toilet paper and paper towels and was met with unbelievable attitude as he pointed to a handwritten “out of order” sign that had just appeared within the visit because it had been available at some point. I entered through the side so I didn’t see it.

Hopefully service improves because the place is super cool.

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace

reviews_data.review_text: Nice to have fresh grapefruit for drinks. Eclectic space with plenty of outside options. Seemed like no food available.
Wow is all I have to say just went in there to use the bathroom and get some water 💧. But I was very impressed 👌 with the place, very classy and unique. Definitely will be back soon
We all face challenges paying bills, but buying products, selling them, and not paying is simply not professional.👎🏻

I want to make the public aware of an ongoing issue we are facing.

Noda Company  placed orders with us, received the product in full, sold the product, and has not paid us since November. Despite repeated attempts to contact them, they have been avoiding communication and resolving the outstanding balance.

We are a small, locally owned business, and situations like this have a real impact on companies like ours

I am sharing this not out of anger, but to encourage accountability and transparency, and to remind others to be mindful of where they spend their money and who they choose to support.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the review Jo! We're happy to hear you had a great experience. Cheers!
reviews_data.review_text: This place has a magical patio, that you wouldn't think from looking at the house turned bar. Very eclectic, nice selection of beer and wine. Outside food is allowed. Dog friendly. We came back and were pleasantly surprised to find this place has new local ownership, Jessie and Brandon. They are in the process of changing the vibe, making it more comfortable and cozy. Love the jazzy music selection, dim lights and candles. Huge back patio, they got rid of the tropical plants and put in sustainable native plants. (Jessie is an awesome gardener). Their shop dog Otis is adorable. Great place to have events and trivia, noise level is pleasant and can have a conversation with people. Good luck guys, we wish you the best 💚

reviews_data.owner_answer: Hi Mike! We really appreciate the 5-star review and the fact you enjoyed your visit! Cheers!
reviews_data.review_text: Updating my review for new owners Jesse and Brandon.  The vibe inside is so cool.  I did not update my outside pics because it is dark out.  Jesse said they have all native plants.  They are going to get their liquor license soon and will have food options in 2026.  Parking in NoDa is a challenge but they are next to a paid parking lot.  Music is not loud.  I take the train from uptown to 36th station to visit. Tuesday is their trivia night.
Chill. Like very chill. They love their peeps and their peeps love them back. You’ll find yourself at home here no matter the intent. Alcohol to non it’s the place to meet your person.
Great new management. Great vibes.

review_questions.Parking options: Paid parking lot, Free street parking

reviews_data.review_text: Great spot for a drink. Can be inside or there is a lot of outside seating. Dog friendly.
Fabulous place to visit!!! Great wine!!!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thanks for the 5 star review Anna! We look forward to seeing you again soon 😊.

review_questions.Noise level: Loud, but you can still talk

reviews_data.review_text: Employees and owners are super kind, great DJ’s, great drink selection

Visiting from out of town and always looking for interesting spots. Very cool place did not disappoint.  Fun outdoor seating w plenty of options, funky beer cafe vibe inside, a great local beer selection, and I’m always a sucker for a popcorn machine!  Definitely worth checking out!

review_questions.Seating type: Indoor dining area, Bar area, Outdoor patio / terrace, Booth seating

reviews_data.review_text: OK… If you’re in NODA Area and are looking for a place to meet up with friends or just hang out for a bit this place has some of the most incredible vibes. I’ve been to in quite a while. This is the go to place in Noda believe me you’re not gonna be disappointed. There is plenty of seating area inside outside or swings. There’s all kind of private area that you can go to the place is comfortable and it’s under a new management as of two months ago… We’re talking about July 20 25? Anyway, the picture of these two guys behind the bar, one of them is the owner or possibly both of them and they give out samples of beer and the service is great and the atmosphere is just freaking off the charts. I met my son here we played some chess and had a great talk this place should’ve been crowded the next time you’re in Nordone just do yourself a favor and check it out. Have a beer and a good discussion

Love this place! Great for hanging out with friends and grabbing a drink. They have beers on tap, canned beers and na drinks, and yummy sangrias. The put door seating is unmatched and perfect for people watching!

This is such a neighborhood staple and they are such community builders. It’s easy to strike up a conversation, share a table and make a new friend At this dog friendly outdoor patio bar. The inside space where you order is not so big, but there are plenty of places to sit in front, in back or on the side of the house. Everyone’s favorite seating are the swing chairs!!
Love how easy they made it. This place definitely lives up to the reviews.

I met friends here because NoDa Company Store had a DJ event on their back patio. The music was exceptional, with Eclipsed Shadows, the DJ duo of Dark Adaptation and Andrew ElectronC, killing it with their drumnbass set.

A catering company set up on the patio and they had what looked to be delicious food but the skies opened just as they were getting ready to serve, so we weren't able to try the food. I also didn't go inside for alcohol, since I don't drink, so I can't attest to their selection, the staff, prices, atmosphere, or food selection, but from what I experienced on the patio, it very much makes me want to check those things out the next time I'm in NoDa! Can't wait to go back!
Cute place for a cold drink! Cute back area with swings, shade and a drink you’re all set! LGBTQIA2S+ friendly

We came here for an informal wedding reception for some friends, and it was perfect! The vibe is super relaxed with lots of seating, fun porch swings, and a great drink selection. It felt like hanging out in someone’s backyard—in the best way. Such a cool spot to gather and celebrate!

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you so much for the 5-star review! We appreciate your patronage!
reviews_data.review_text: Best place to get some beer and hang out with friends

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the 5-star review! We really appreciate the feedback and that you had a great experience with us! Cheers and Happy Holidays!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Dumpling Lady, Frozen, Pork Belly Noodles, Dumplings, Pork Belly Dumpling, Canada Dry, Empanada, Warm Baguette, Slurpy, Triple C, Crepe, Rosé, Prosciutto, Four Cheese, Noda Hop Drop'n Roll, Make It a Double

reviews_data.review_text: What a cute little busy place. Small menu, very diverse & cute tiki style seating.  I ordered a Cbd drink Goodwell. It was very good.  Service was nice too. Hope to come back and hang around this area more. Blessed. Thank you kindly.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the awesome review, Maikoi! Happy Holidays!
reviews_data.review_text: Love it! Best experiences there

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the 5-star review, Kimberly! Cheers to you and Happy Holidays!
reviews_data.review_text: First time to NoDa and love the vibe of the neighborhood. And the NoDa company store is a perfect spot in this great part of town. Went for a happy hour drink, sat on the patio- loved all the fun sitting areas, ambiance with many plants and the drinks were tasty too! Wish there was a NoDa Co store in my hometown!

reviews_data.owner_answer: We're glad to hear you had a great experience with us! There's plenty more SUNBOY available! Cheers and Happy Holidays!
reviews_data.review_text: Amazing backyard, pristine vibes. The team here is warm and welcoming. Perfect place to really spread out in the sunshine. Tons of picnic tables and shade. Love this spot for a SUNBOY Spiked Coconut water and an afternoon hang.

reviews_data.owner_answer: Thank you for the awesome review, John! We're happy to hear everything went well and you all had an awesome day with us!
reviews_data.review_text: Can’t have enough good things to say. The owner(THANK YOU JOHN!) accommodate our party after we had a wedding canceled in Asheville. They were able to host our whole group and was texting and calling to coordinate past 9pm on a Saturday. Go to Noda Company Store, they will treat you right.

reviews_data.owner_answer: We appreciate the review, Mark! For future reference feel free to bring take out when hunger ails you. Cheers!  :)
reviews_data.review_text: Didn't have food, but the service was excellent and the atmosphere was cozy enough to spark great conversations. Just stopped in for a late night drink.

Rated a 5 on food because the VooDoo chips and plantain chips are awesome (they don’t serve hot food here). This is my favorite spot in NoDa by far. About a year ago, it looked downtrodden - the plants were dead, the atmosphere was dull, it wasn’t being taken care of - NOW! the plants are beautiful, the market lighting at night is so charming, the music is the best … and the pina colada is awesome. I love the rotating beers on tap and the Sunday Sangria is a fun surprise every week. The indoor seating is a nice place to escape the heat too. 10/10 best spot in NoDa.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hi Ryan. Part of the transfer of ownership included the original owners taking the NoDaColada recipe with them. We mutually agreed on this as it was their personal recipe. 

Stay tuned for new drinks as well as mocktails!

We apologize that you didn’t enjoy your time at NoDa Company Store. We ask for your patience as we develop new offerings.
reviews_data.review_text: Update: the topicolada is back and it slaps. This place rocks again.

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Thank you for the awesome review Rachel! We’ll be sure to let Olivia know!

Cheers!
reviews_data.review_text: Even after the “change” Olivia made it the best/same experience we’ve always had. Thank you!

I don't know yow I didn't know this was right around the corner. Staff were knowledgeable and provided quick service. The atmosphere is chill and relaxing. Will definitely be back. New hangout activated.
Love coming here for drinks with friends and family.
Beer and wine only. Great low key patio
Such a great spot! Super cute and good drink options.
The people are superb and the vibe is so welcoming. I cannot wait to go back!

Cute little place that has some beer on tap, custom cocktails, some frozen. Beer, wine, seltzers stocked. Some snacks.  The outdoor area is so nicely themed with some swings and tables to enjoy the weather
Beautiful outside sitting area. It’s quaint setting with swings, wooden benches, huts, beautiful setting. Wonderful area in Noda to spend time in evening. They have great selection of drinks.
Great place to pop in for a drink. We really enjoy the swings.

I have been visiting The Store since it first opened. Coming here is like coming home.  There is always a warm and friendly smile waiting for you.  Oh, their NoDa Colada during the summer, and their spiced mull wine in the fall are perfection!
Just to be clear the swings were not hung by professionals. If you sit on one keep your wits about you or you'll end up on your bum.
Best spot ever. Just saying 😏 Great outdoor seating, friendly staff and delicious beer. Must visit!
A wonderful outdoor spot to hang out. The absolute perfect spot for a Sunday Funday! They don't have the largest selection of drink choices but always end up finding something I like.
Just had drinks but love the back patio and thr beet selection.
Our most favorite Hang out spot in Charlotte PERIODT!!! 👑❤️🙏🏾👊🏾💪🏾🦄
They don’t have a lot of options other than craft beer but the vibes are nice and the service was friendly.

Looks like a fun place in the evening.
We came just as they opened, at noon, so the place was empty.
Still, we got a friendly service, and the drinks were amazing!! Definitely try their version of the bloody Mary!
The staff was friendly and nice, and we'll definitely come back some evening to enjoy the full potential this place has.
Great place to have a drink and chat.....

The Beer Garden is undoubtedly done up very nicely and is a great place to hang out for some beers. It’s tucked away enough so that it still feels a little bit like a secret. They have some cool T-shirts etc. for sale inside and a decent selection of drinks. It can be very long wait times for the bar since it is small and they only have one bathroom so it can be a bit of a wait for that also. They’ve started to put porta potty’s in the beer garden which is a mistake on hot days.

Came here for drinks and the cute patio! Unfortunately all of the drinks are wine/beer based and no seltzers or seltzer type drinks. However; the frozen colada was yummy and didn’t taste like wine like the other beverages. We enjoyed the patio!

Loved the Noda Company Store. I can’t believe I’ve lived here almost a year and never found it before. Such friendly service and a great draft list and tons of snacks and other beverages to choose from. I could’ve even brought my dog. I had no idea. So excited to go back
This place is one of a kind! Amazing experience, beautiful patio, NoDa Colada are to die for… If you haven’t been, you’re missing one of the best places in Charlotte. Go!
Best Patio, Local Store, and Service!!! Also Free Lunch Sundays are amazing! Every employee is phenomenal! 👑🙏🏾💪🏾👊🏾❤️🖤💚
Such a relaxing aesthetic. Awesome service and fun drinks! Will be back
My favorite spot in the city!  Great people, craft beer and wine cocktails (no spirits), art, games, swings and more.
Cool place. Good environment
Noda's back porch. Such a cool, casual atmosphere. Easy place to hang out any time of day, any day of the week.
Lovely little backyard oasis. Try the noda colada!
Cute 🤷‍♂️ boring staff though..
Cool Vibe
Worth checking out. Good time
Always a great experience
Neat place. Nice outdoor area, which is the focal of this venue. Drinks were just ok. Except I enjoyed the Pina colada drink.
Nice outdoor space

My all time favorite place in Noda. The atmosphere. The renovated bungalow. Everything about it is so relaxing, welcoming and just a great place for friends, family, date night, day drinking. You name it.
Great beer selection and cool patio with a bit of a tiki theme.
Best place to hang out in the neighborhood. Staff is always nice and the atmosphere can't be beat
Great  hangout!
Super cute patio and wine slushies!
Delicious, wonderful environment and great price
Always been a favorite spot.. since they turned that empty house into the fun spot.  Great drink selection, snacks to buy, and always welcome my 🐶 love the owners too! So kind!
Great casual place to grab a drink and as it outside in beautiful tropical looking back patio. Snacks and no alcoholic drinks available. And free food grilled outside on select Sunday Fundays.
Good beer selection on tap and in cans.
Really cute outdoor setup that makes you feel you're not in Charlotte anymore. I had the non-frozen Noda Colada & the Sangria and they were both ON POINT!

The employees are SO sweet. Whitney (I think that was her name!) went out of their way to make our experience a good one and this is one of our favorite places to go for drinks. The patio area is very cute and fun and a perfect photo opportunity.
Really like the atmosphere. Groovy spot
Great service, great atmosphere, one of my favorite spots.
We went here for a long weekend in Charlotte. We loved ordering drinks and sitting on the swings. Definitely would go again!
Awesome Atmosphere. Enjoyable.  Relaxed, Wonderful Hosts. Friendly Fun Sunday Funday Afternoon
bonita experiencia, muy buena calidad de la cerveza
Great beer selection, well priced, and awesome outdoor area. An awesome hidden gem in NoDa that everyone needs to try. The swings are a huge plus. Will come back again!
buen ambiente y de las mejores cervezas que he probado jamas...

This is a great place to enjoy wine by the bottle or a pitcher of beer, or just a pint and sit on the patio. I took a star off because all the seating is outside. It's so hot now and with all other business open for inside service again it would be great to have some inside seating added back and maybe some stronger fans outside.
Music atmosphere drinks all 5 star
Vibes are perfect here. Come outside and sit under the tree and enjoy a beer. Can meet great people here.
The

Great place to experience NODA. It truly has the vibe of the area, very relaxed and peaceful with beautiful diversity. They have a great drink selection including a draft list, sangrias, coladas and mimosas. The outdoor area is wonderful, full of beautiful greenery and vibrant flowers complete with swings to enjoy the view. It is a great, local spot and we find ourselves here often. I highly recommend if you want to relax in a swing, sip a great drink and meet locals.
Fantastic outdoor atmosphere.  Love the frosty drinks to give you a tropical vibe
Awesome atmosphere comfortable seating options and the staff was very helpful
Such a gem, never disappointed! I love this place 😍

Fun oasis in NoDa. Unique twist on a sangria in a warm and welcoming atmosphere. Variety of seating available. Parking can be tough in this neighborhood but a surface lot is next door. Great place for a date.
Come for good drinks, unique outdoor space, and to support local business owners. I always bring my friends from out of town here because it’s my favorite brewery in Charlotte!

Such a quaint find! Absolutely loved the outdoor seating area to have a drink and relax.  The drink selection is a bit limited, but the sangrias were very good.  As a bonus, it is dog friendly but not off leash so you can bring your furry friend without worry and sit outside with a large group.  I think you could probably fit a good dozen people in some of the seating areas or share one of those spaces with another small group. This place is adorable so we'll definitely be going back!

What can I say about the company store other than its probably one of the top 5 patios in Charlotte. They are really dog friendly but you need to keep.your pup.on a leash. They've always got a great draft selection, tons of cans in the coolers and snack food. They have pitchers of drinks as well. They have many seating options to choose from such as huge banquettes, fire pits, swings. Some are even covered. Do yourself a favor and pay to park in the lot in the back.
Absolutely love this place! Amazing outdoor patio. Always a fun place to chill. Love the sangria!!
This place is amazing!
Super cozy outdoor bar. Met my coworkers there and we had a great time! Dog friendly too so they can also enjoy the patio. Will definitely come back with my pups!
Great bottle shop w lots of outdoor seating
Very nice bartenders and great beer! Love the atmosphere.
I love this place is perfect for dates .
Still one of my all time favorite places. Amazing staff and service. Their patio just can't be beat!

One of my favorite places in Noda. Such an eclectic and fun place to enjoy local brews and people watching. There are ample places to sit, at both large group benches around fire pit tables and more fun intimate spots like the rope swing tiki huts. It's best in warmer weather since it's all outdoor seating currently.
These guys dealt with the challenges of COVID brilliantly. A true asset to the neighborhood, and a great place to have a beer.
Awesome outdoor seating with heat and great service and of course beer...Duh

Great, simple spot in the NoDa area. Seating is outside, so you need to take the weather into consideration. During Covid times, outside seating is spaced out enough where you can enjoy a drink without a mask on. You order your drinks inside and you can also take home a six pack of your favorite beer or a bottle of wine. Dogs are welcome outside.

Amazing tropical patio with unique interesting elements. FrieStore is exhibiting excellent caution for COVID as well.

Good beer and wine selection with decent prices. Definitely a new favorite to work during work hours or chill after hours.
A true Noda neighborhood gem!
One of the best little stores in town, love the owners, love the neighborhood, love the selection. What's not to like?
Beaitiful setting, fantastic atmosphere, good drinks!

One of the best patios in Charlotte, loved the experience. Grabbed a few bottles of wine with a cheese plate and some other appetizers and just enjoyed the moment with good friends. Highly recommend stopping by and having a great time at this spot!!
Cute patio and doggie park!
The vibe, music, atmosphere can't be beat 💯
Love this place, but there is this one guy (short, with dark hair) that is just not friendly at all. I would give it a 5 star cause this is a super cool spot and the owners are great!
Great beer and environment!

Th3 wnuv
Znizzle in your nizzle
Cool patio with beach vibes. Beers by the can or on draft collection with a dog friendly patio!
Love this place! So cool and welcoming! Must visit!!
Adequate bar with good Bloody Marys.
Great neighborhood hangout
Great place for a chill evening. Wide variety of beer and wine options. Friendly staff and patrons. Lovely outdoor area.
Hip & comfortable place.  Outdoor seating available with a little firepit.

Great spot. The beer is good the sangria was awesome! The outdoor area is such a great spot to hang out. The place has an awesome
vibe
I dont get here as often as Id like. I consider Scott and Joey  Family. One of my favorite spots in Noda

Appears to be a pretty nice and comfortable gathering spot. I visited the lobster roll truck on site and it was good. The beer selection on the inside was pretty typical for the area. Worth a visit if the NODA crowd is yours.

I'm really reluctant to write this review, just because I don't want MORE people to come to my favorite spot of all times! The Company Store is absolutely wonderful, as is every single person who works there. <3 The selection of drinks is great and prices are fair. I especially love their winter specials (mulled wine and mulled cider) and the amazing food trucks that they attract! If you're vegan, they have a food truck for you at least twice a week, if not more often. The ambience is relaxed, and the patio is hands down the best one in the area. If you don't love the Company Store, it's on you, not them!
Great place to chill and sip on a drink.
Very cool place
Good atmosphere. Some fun. Prices ok.

Best place in Charlotte. Great staff, a wide selection on beer, wine and seasonal drinks. Food trucks stop by here (check schedule), winter has a fire pit, summer fun activities. Very nice decor and absolutely chill outside.

Favorite neighborhood spot and massive fan of meatless mondays. Great sangrias and mulled wine. Cozy, eclectic, homey vibe that’s great to bring friends to for a good board game. The owners and staff are friendly faces and keep doing wonderful things for the noda community. Can’t recommend this place enough!!!
A chill spot with fun games, lots of outdoor seating, local beers. Cozy and clean, and dog friendly!
Always a fresh and fun experience! 12/10

I love Noda I love their beer I love the environment there I really really wish they had bar food and not food trucks parked on the outside it doesn't offer much of a variety but then again you don't go to noda for the food If you like noda beer  you'll like the noda company store... I like it...so there's that

What a cute place to hang out! I love the artsy decor. I tried a sweet potato kombuchia . Not bad at all. Also had an apple cider sangria. They had Queen Charlotte bleu pimiento cheese with some local crackers. Delicious. This place does a lot for the community. They're always having free food evenings and stuff. Bought a cute tee shirt here. Loved it
Nice place to swing by and grab a drink.  Patio is nice, and they let you bring food.
Meatless Monday’s is great for vegan beginners
This place is Huge.  It is great place to take a girl on the first date.  There are tons of little nooks that you can sit where you can get a casual setting to have one on one attention.
Casual place to hang out and drink some beer or wine. Lots of outdoor seating to choose from (good shaded options too!). No food (except some snacks) but there is often a food truck.

Love the atmosphere.
Feels like your at Scott and Joeys home
This is my favorite place. GREAT owners. GREAT staff. Good Morning Vietnam. Meatless Mondays. Everything. ❤🍻
The place totally rocks!  Love the beers, love the vibe, and love MEATLESS MONDAYS!
Great vibes and free food on monday
So relaxing. Scott & Joey are amazing people!!
Always a good time at NoDa Company Store. My wife, pup, and I love the variety of outdoor seating and lovely people
One of my favorite places in Noda. Atmosphere is great. Service is very friendly. Pet friendly with rotating taps, food trucks, and kombucha.
They have adult slushies and swings. Literally, that's all you need to know. Just go.
Quaint bottle shop in Noda off the main strip
Great beer selection. The Dumpling Lady food truck out back is amazing!
One of the best places in Charlotte! Love having a drink outside on a nice day. Try the sangria or NoDa colada.
Great beer, great ambiance, great service!
Always a laid back great time. Staff is the beat!
Nice place to relax and have something to drink. Great vibe.
love the outdoor space!
Friendly atmosphere, great neighborhood bar.
Had a great first experience! Melissa was so very helpful and super sweet to my child! Will definitely be regulars now!
Decent outdoor section
Cool hang out. Nice to staff and good beer selection!!

We had a happy hour here tonight and I loved it.

The environment was very laid back. There's a decent size indoor area, a front porch, and a huge back patio. We got a table in the shade on the patio.

They have beers on tap and bottles. There's wine, cider, sangria, kombucha, and some snacks. They also have a food truck there.

Overall, this is a great place to relax and have a drink. I would definitely recommend it!
Nice staff and very relaxed environment. Also the free food on Sundays is always good.
Probably the place we go to the most. Really laid back atmosphere. Dog friendly.
Nice little spot!
Great place to spend a Sunday afternoon
They have a few card/board games. Decent number of beer options. Friendly service. Nice outdoor seating.
Interesting mix of people in a comfortable and affordable environment

N.C.S. is amazing place to chillax with family, friends, boyfriend(girl), dog or yourself.
The atmosphere here is incredible good. Dont forget to get your souvenir.
P&L ✌🏼
An awesome place to hang out. And prosecco on tap?!? Yes, please!!!
I love this place! Such a great place to have a tasty drink (alcoholic or non) and vibe out. The staff is phenomenal and it feels like home!
Eclectic!
Super cool place to check out, we loved it
Was atmospheric but smelled like cigarettes

This is a really gorgeous spot to sit and relax with a book and a glass (or 4) of beer or wine. The building itself is stupid cute and super homey. There is a huge patio out back, as well as several bench swings that you can post up in and enjoy all the gorgeous plants they have. Try their tasty sangrias!
An excellent spot to hang, day or night.   This place really thrives when you can take advantage of their outdoor space.
I love to swings outside and the whole vibe of this place. Great place to grab a drink with friends!
My favorite spot on a Sunday :)
Fantastic environment. Good people . Good times!
Friendly staff. Great beer selection. Chill environment.
Ok place to just hang out, wasn't much going on when we were there on a Sunday
One of the best places in NoDa. Great drinks. Great staff. Nice atmosphere.
Great place.  Dog friendly. Great beers
Great drink selection along with an inviting atmosphere.
Great atmosphere and great beers to match. Cant wait to come back!
One of a kind place! Laid back store, hangout, farmers market, juice bar and so much more! Full of heart and soul!
Always a great place to grab a drink! Great atmosphere inside and out. Good drink options. Farmers market on saturdays and free lunch on sundays.
One of my favorite brunch or beer spots
Loved the neighborhood vibe to this location. Plenty of seating both indoors and outdoors with great prices on drinks. I’m not sure if it’s just a Monday special but everything behind the bar was $5!
Fun, small, intimate. We played games and had a beer it was great!
I love the location of this place. Great service and great selection of drinks. I'll be back ASAP!
I adore this place. Beautiful aesthetic, wonderful employees and fantastic wine & beer.  Great place for pals to hang!

I've always wanted to go to Sunday funday free brunch. Now the guys have left for Honduras and my heart is broken. The vibe here is very chill and there is always a food truck so you can stop by any night of the week for good eats, drinks, and atmosphere. At the moment I know pasta la vista is there on Tuesdays and dumpling lady is there all day Saturday. I need to get there on an ace of spuds night.
My husband and and I always go here for a low-key pint of beer. We love it most when The Dumpling lady is there too!
Great atmosphere, beautiful place and great people running it. Also a big plus when The Dumpling Lady is there on Saturdays
My favorite neighborhood bar. Let's get some live music!
Great location, easy access, amazing drink selection, cool vib!
Great place with wonderful people 😍

This is my favorite place in Noda and one of my favorite places in Charlotte.  It’s such a chill, inviting, cozy place to hang out and have a couple beverages and/or get some work done.  They have a fantastic outdoor space, too.  The place has so much character, both inside and out!  They have a great food truck line up, too.  They have a very good craft beer selection, as well as wine.  I wish there were more places like Company Store.
Awesome place! They remodeled a bit since I had been there last. It looks great and flows better. They have a great list of all local Charlotte beers on tap. Also live music out back. Check it out!
Nice and quiet place to hang out in the evening
An essential stop if day drinking.
Good beer and a very cozy friendly vibe.
No food and the name makes one think that there are snacks and other things you can buy. Drink selection is not varied.
Great service and very friendly too, the setting and care put into the place shows and is unique to me, would love to show this place to anyone that comes in town and just have a good hangout.
Great selection of beer/wine/cider with a nice outdoor space. Perfect for a midweek chill
Nice patio when the sun goes down.
Great place to hang out

Nice atmosphere. Good beer, we bought ours in a six pack and they gave us a bucket of ice. Games to play.

Reminds me of the Common Market except without food and less grungy.

Good amount of outdoor seating. Dog friendly on a leash.
Un lugar divertido para pasar un rato agradable con amigos o solo. Las bebidas son a un precio justo y se consiguen cervezas de diferentes sabores.

The Co Store is great. There's always something happening, like the NoDa farmers market or food trucks or dance nights. They also have a great sangria always available for $6 or something ridiculously cheap like that. Their patio is pretty unbeatable too because it feels like you're hanging out in someone's back yard, chilling, because they have porch swings. I only wish that it was a little bigger.

Interesting place to hang out on a a Sunday afternoon.  The owners  cook a free lunch for anyone who shows up. The place had an eclectic crowd and the drinks inside has something for everyone. They have cozy seating both inside and out and folks come to hang out.  It is dog, family and bike friendly

Good place to hang out and get to know new people and outside there is a food truck to order fish and chips, there are plenty of seats outside to enjoy the evening, but limited parking unless you park in the paid area.
One of our favorite places to start a night out.
Great quaint gathering place to enjoy a glass of wine or beer! Loved the outdoor space and the swings!
Great mimosas with fresh squeezed orange juice, relaxed neighborhood feel
Good drinks and a great NoDa vibe.

Great little spot to hang out with friends and grab a beer. Scene was vibrant, staff was very pleasant, and shop was clean. Only issue and cause of -1 star was extremely long wait to the only bathroom.
Absolutely love this place. Can't wait to get back and try the food trucks out.
Love this neighborhood hangout.

I love this place! Fun, cozy vibe with multiple outdoor patio areas. They serve a great selection of craft beer, wine, and sangria.  And with their in house selection of board games, this has become a favorite stop for my friend group.
Grab a drink and play some cards against humanity in a laid back and friendly atmosphere.
Great Atmosphere, Friendly Staff, & Welcoming Spirit
Always a good spot. Good drink options and lots of outdoor seating. One of the more laid back places in an otherwise busy part of town.
Love it. Love the sandwich specials.
Really nice and comfy. Chill atmosphere, good selection of drinks and finger foods.
Its so Organic outside. Lol. Free Lunch on Sundays. Not affiliated w NoDa brewing.
Absolutely a new favorite, looks VERY hipster-ish from outside but is super relaxed and cozy inside.
Best bar in the city hands down

There best of NoDa. A chill atmosphere, ample outdoor seating for the warmer months, eclectic artwork, a selection of snacks, bottled beverages, a few taps of beer, sangria and fun people watching make this a great place to hang out. Pop-up food events are always fun (watch Facebook)
Love this place. Everyone is soooo friendly.  The service is excellent
Cozy joint. Cool outdoor space when the weather is right!
Such an awesome place. Staff is super friendly, the beer selection is decent and their free brunches on Sunday mornings is always tasty!
Great atmosphere!

This place is classic NoDa. It's one of my favorite places in the area. This place is kind of tucked behind other places so it's not the easiest to find, but worth the trip!

It's a really laid back atmosphere. The bar tenders are awesome, super friendly and sometimes provide free homemade food(they had cookies and Brunswick stew yesterday!).

The beer menu is awesome. They have a relatively small tap list, but the quality is great. It's usually 100% local beer, and they always have prosecco on tap too! Combine that with some great homemade Sangria and you have a great spot for drinks.

They also serve prepackaged food like chips, hummus, etc. It has a good outside vibe area as well, both in the front and back.
Great Saturday late afternoon for the pup and I. We enjoyed our Pilsner and the dumpling lady's veggie option. Delcious and great locals to meet.

Came here on a local's recommendation. It was pretty quiet for a Sunday afternoon but you can see why people are attracted to the cozy and creatively decorated space. House sangrias in two varieties, local craft beers on tap, and an awesome selection of cans and bottles you can crack open and enjoy in store.
The owners are great, the staff are wonderful and the people always nice.
Cool spot
Good place to relax and have some drinks. Great owners.
Love the atmosphere and the guys that run this place. Such a chill vibe and great place to take anyone for a relaxing afternoon or a night out.
Good drinks, great environment, and always have the best food trucks!
Great place to relax, grab a drink and see your neighbors. Love this place.
Great vibe and atmosphere. Owners are pretty cool and friendly. Good place to hangout with friends, family, or by yourself.
Love the swings!

Great neighborhood spot.  Local beers available and unlike the current trend of having free range children running around everywhere, they went to the trouble of putting in a garden area for adults only where you can chill out and relax.
Reasonably priced drinks and a chill vibe
My favorite place in town. Free, homemade lunch on Sunday’s 11-3. Great porch swings and beer selection. Usually have food trucks but outside food is allowed. Amazing owners.
Cool spot but the markup is absurd. I can get the same beer for a little more than half the price about a mile away.
Awesome place to hang out with friends.

One of our favorite places in Charlotte. We bring out-of-towners who think this city is just banking centers and barbecue. Snag a porch swing chair on the side of the building for a shaded hideaway in the heart of NoDa.

raw_data.subtypes: Wine bar, Beer garden, Beer store, Wine store
